description: An asset manager uses an AI model to analyze drone imagery of thousands of utility poles to identify defects.

nodes.task_description: Process and categorize a large batch of pole inspection images.

expected_outcome.expected: System ingests and organizes the imagery.

nodes.task_description: Run a computer vision model on the images to detect and classify defects like rot, woodpecker damage, and cracked crossarms.

expected_outcome.expected: AI model flags 50 poles with potential defects requiring review.

nodes.task_description: Prioritize the flagged poles for follow-up physical inspection based on the severity of the detected defects.

expected_outcome.expected: System creates a prioritized list of poles for field crews to inspect.
